Select Model and Effort
1. gpt-5.5 (default)      Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.
› 2. gpt-5.6-sol (current)  Latest frontier agentic coding model.
3. gpt-5.6-terraBalanced agentic coding model for everyday work.
4. gpt-5.6-lunaFast and affordable agentic coding model.
5. gpt-5.4Strong model for everyday coding.
6. gpt-5.4-miniSmall, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.
7. gpt-5.3-codex-sparkUltra-fast coding model.
